title: helichrysum expansum
intro: Helichrysum expansum, also known as the yellow paper flower or elephant ear, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum expansum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and relieving stress and anxiety, thanks to its essential oil's ability to promote relaxation and calmness. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, tinctures, and essential oils that can be used to support overall well-being.
